name: Shopify
summary: Sync your stock and orders with Shopify. Centralize your entire order flow across channels, with real-time stock syncing.
tagline: Shopify handles everything, from payment all the way to the returns process.
about: Shopify is a platform that lets you easily set up and manage a webshop. It helps you sell products, process payments, and design your store without needing any technical knowledge. You can use it to sell both online and offline, for example through a physical store or a pop-up shop.

faqs.a: You can set this yourself. While connecting your Shopify store, you can indicate whether you want this. You can easily change it afterwards.
